info.name: JSONPlaceholder API Test Suite - Run 9c9e1b6f
info.description:
Comprehensive API test suite for JSONPlaceholder.
Run ID: 9c9e1b6f
69 test scenarios. Full coverage: 41/41 endpoints.

Newman command:
newman run postman_collection.json -e postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export results.json
